pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target levels remain at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-boot.version from 3.0.6 to 3.4.2 to align with JDK 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.x may not fully support or optimize for JDK 21 features; 3.4.x is the compatible line.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.validation-api with jakarta.validation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.validation-api is not available in Jakarta EE 10+ (Spring Boot 3.x) environments; code using javax.validation will fail to compile or run.
